title: Script Container
text: Script Container Location for defining the ProcScript modules of the associated object. Description The Script code container can contain: Constant declarations with container scope System triggers Interactive triggers Operations Web triggers and operations (in DSP components) Functions Entries Note: Entities have two Script containers—Collection Script and Occurrence Script for defining entity-level (collection) and occurrence-level processing. A constant defined in a Script container of an object is not available to other objects in the component. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
